roles.name: Technician
roles.description: Field technician with task execution rights

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to reporting and data

assets.name: Paint Line Robot A1
assets.description: Primary painting robot for automotive parts

assets.name: Assembly Station B3
assets.description: Manual assembly workstation for engine components

assets.name: HVAC System H3
assets.description: Climate control system for paint shop

assets.name: Laser Cutting Machine I1
assets.description: Precision laser cutting for metal sheets

assets.name: Paint Oven N1
assets.description: High-temperature curing oven for painted parts

assets.name: Material Handling AGV O1
assets.description: Automated guided vehicle for parts transport

maintenance_orders.description: Apply synthetic lubricant to all articulated joints, calibrate TCP (Tool Center Point) offset, verify orientation angles within ±0.05°, run diagnostic tool path validation
maintenance_orders.title: Paint Line Robot A1 - Weekly Maintenance

maintenance_orders.description: Monthly tool calibration and inspection. Verify torque values across all tool channels, recalibrate using master standard, inspect bit wear and replace as necessary, validate clutch engagement
maintenance_orders.title: Assembly Station B3 - Tool Calibration

maintenance_orders.description: URGENT: Welding tip severely degraded causing poor weld penetration and visual defects. Remove gun from manifold, replace with new copper alloy tip (Part #WG-850X), recalibrate current parameters at 450A, perform trial run on test panel
maintenance_orders.justification: Production line stopped due to faulty welding tip
maintenance_orders.title: BIW Welding Robot C2 - Emergency Tip Replacement
maintenance_orders.root_cause: Root cause for Emergency repair - welding tip replacement
maintenance_orders.recovery: Recovery action for Emergency repair - welding tip replacement

maintenance_orders.description: Adjust belt tension to specification (50-60mm deflection), inspect for lateral alignment and wear patterns, clean drive roller surfaces, measure bearing resistance and motor current
maintenance_orders.title: Conveyor System D1 - Belt Tension & Alignment

maintenance_orders.description: Verify all measurement channels are calibrated to master standard within ±0.01mm tolerance using certified calibration blocks and perform daily zero-point verification
maintenance_orders.title: Quality Control Station E1 - Measurement Calibration

maintenance_orders.description: Filter replacement and spray gun cleaning
maintenance_orders.title: Paint Booth F2 - Filter & Gun Maintenance

maintenance_orders.description: Check hydraulic fluid pressure (18-22 bar), verify pump operation at 1500 RPM, inspect hoses for leaks, top up reservoir with ISO 32 hydraulic fluid
maintenance_orders.title: Stamping Press G1 - Hydraulic System Check

maintenance_orders.description: Replace intake and output air filters (MERV-13), inspect ductwork for blockages, clean condenser coils, verify airflow at 2000 CFM minimum
maintenance_orders.title: HVAC System H3 - Filter & Duct Maintenance

maintenance_orders.description: URGENT: Laser output power degraded, cutting precision exceeds ±0.3mm tolerance on test cuts. Perform lens alignment check using calibration test grid, replace focusing lens if scratched, recalibrate CO2 tube power at 80W nominal
maintenance_orders.title: Laser Cutting Machine I1 - Head Alignment & Lens

maintenance_orders.description: Comprehensive end effector inspection and gripper calibration. Detailed maintenance scope: verify gripper jaw alignment, inspect pneumatic seals for leaks, test gripper force calibration against specification, validate sensor response times, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Assembly Robot J4 - Weekly End Effector Inspection

maintenance_orders.description: Pump maintenance and color accuracy check. Detailed maintenance scope: inspect pump seals and bearings, verify flow rates against specification, test color mixing ratios for accuracy, clean filters and nozzles, document findings, validate tolerances, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Paint Mixing Station K1 - Weekly Pump Maintenance

maintenance_orders.description: Electrode replacement and current calibration. Detailed maintenance scope: measure electrode wear using go/no-go gauge, replace electrodes exceeding tolerance, calibrate welding current to 450A nominal, verify electrode tip geometry, perform test welds on sample material, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Spot Welding Gun L2 - Daily Electrode Service

maintenance_orders.description: Conveyor belt inspection and station alignment. Detailed maintenance scope: inspect belt for wear patterns and tracking, verify station alignment using laser alignment tools, check tension and bearing condition, validate electrical interlocks, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Final Assembly Line M1 - Weekly Conveyor Inspection

maintenance_orders.description: Temperature sensor calibration and burner check. Detailed maintenance scope: calibrate temperature sensors using certified reference standard, inspect burner flame pattern and ignition system, verify airflow rates, test temperature uniformity across oven zones, document findings, validate tolerances, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Paint Oven N1 - Monthly Temperature Calibration

maintenance_orders.description: Battery replacement and navigation system check. Detailed maintenance scope: test battery capacity under load, inspect charging contacts for wear, verify navigation sensor calibration, test emergency stop functionality, validate obstacle detection system, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Material Handling AGV O1 - Battery Service
maintenance_orders.root_cause: Root cause for Battery replacement and navigation system check
maintenance_orders.recovery: Recovery action for Battery replacement and navigation system check

maintenance_orders.description: Robot safety sensor check - Quick inspection. Detailed maintenance scope: test all safety interlocks and light curtains, verify emergency stop response time, inspect safety mat functionality, validate collaborative operation modes, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Paint Line Robot A1 - Daily Safety Inspection

maintenance_orders.description: Emergency stop button test. Detailed maintenance scope: actuate all emergency stop buttons along conveyor line, verify immediate motor shutdown, test reset functionality, inspect button mechanical condition, document findings, validate response times, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Conveyor System D1 - Daily Emergency Stop Test

maintenance_orders.description: Weekend - Deep cleaning and filter replacement. Detailed maintenance scope: verify parameters, inspect related components, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Weekend - Deep cleaning and filter replacement

maintenance_orders.description: Weekend - Complete robot calibration. Detailed maintenance scope: verify parameters, inspect related components, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Weekend - Complete robot calibration

maintenance_orders.description: Weekend - System overhaul and testing. Detailed maintenance scope: verify parameters, inspect related components, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Weekend - System overhaul and testing

maintenance_orders.description: Weekend - Precision alignment and calibration. Detailed maintenance scope: verify parameters, inspect related components, document findings, and confirm stable operation before handover.
maintenance_orders.title: Weekend - Precision alignment and calibration
Test Shift Report Night Breakdown
maintenance_orders.description: Reactive breakdown created and completed during night shift (2026-03-09). This MO demonstrates a completed breakdown with downtime tracking and appears in the Breakdowns section.
maintenance_orders.root_cause: Conveyor drive motor bearing failure detected during operation
maintenance_orders.recovery: Replaced worn bearing, realigned drive shaft, verified operation

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Night Work Request
maintenance_orders.description: Corrective work request completed during night shift. This appears in the Work Requests section as a non-reactive completed item.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Night Engineering Support
maintenance_orders.description: Engineering diagnostic completed during night shift. This MO appears in Engineering Support section with proper MO link formatting.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Night Handover To Early
maintenance_orders.description: Reactive issue started during night shift, still in progress. This MO hands over to the early shift and should appear in Handover to Next Shift section.
maintenance_orders.recovery: Partial disassembly completed, awaiting replacement nozzle from stores

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Early Breakdown
maintenance_orders.description: Reactive breakdown created and completed during early shift (2026-03-10). Demonstrates breakdown handling with full documentation.
maintenance_orders.root_cause: Pneumatic actuator seal failure causing air leak
maintenance_orders.recovery: Replaced actuator seal kit, pressure tested system, resumed operation

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Early Work Request
maintenance_orders.description: Corrective work completed during early shift. Shows in Work Requests section as completed corrective maintenance.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Early Handover To Next
maintenance_orders.description: Reactive issue started during early shift, ongoing. This MO should appear in Handover to Next Shift for the night shift report.
maintenance_orders.recovery: System diagnostics in progress, awaiting hydraulic specialist

maintenance_orders.title: Test Shift Report Early Engineering Support
maintenance_orders.description: Engineering diagnostic completed during early shift. This MO appears in Engineering Support section with proper MO link formatting.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Night PM
maintenance_orders.description: Preventive maintenance completed during weekend night shift (2026-03-14). This PM demonstrates weekend maintenance scheduling and appears in the PMs section.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Night MO
maintenance_orders.description: Corrective work completed during weekend night shift. This appears in MOs/Tickets section showing weekend reactive maintenance.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Night Additional Ticket
maintenance_orders.description: Additional corrective ticket completed during weekend night shift. Shows in Additional Tickets section for non-PM, non-primary maintenance work.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Night Handover To Early
maintenance_orders.description: Corrective issue started during weekend night shift, ongoing. This MO hands over to the early weekend shift.
maintenance_orders.recovery: Cooling system inspection in progress, replacement parts ordered

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Early PM
maintenance_orders.description: Preventive maintenance completed during weekend early shift (2026-03-15). Demonstrates weekend PM execution with full documentation.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Early MO
maintenance_orders.description: Corrective maintenance completed during weekend early shift. Shows in MOs/Tickets section.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Early Additional Ticket
maintenance_orders.description: Additional maintenance work completed during weekend early shift. Appears in Additional Tickets section.

maintenance_orders.title: Test Weekend Report Early Handover To Next
maintenance_orders.description: Corrective issue started during weekend early shift, ongoing. This MO should hand over to the next shift.
maintenance_orders.root_cause: AGV battery management system error under investigation
maintenance_orders.recovery: System diagnostics running, awaiting software update from vendor
